mapper.select:
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_card WHERE del_flag = '0') AS totalCards, COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(p.update_time)) AS learnDays, COUNT(*) AS totalLearnRecords, SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unlearnedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fuzzyCount, SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS masteredCount, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN p.status >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)), 1) ELSE 0 END AS learnedRate FROM biz_user_progress p
AND p.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT p.user_id AS userId, COALESCE(u.nickname, '未知用户') AS nickname, u.avatar AS avatar, COUNT(*) AS totalCards, SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS masteredCount, SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fuzzyCount FROM biz_user_progress p LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.user_id IS NOT NULL AND p.status >= 1 GROUP BY p.user_id, u.nickname, u.avatar ORDER BY masteredCount DESC, totalCards DESC LIMIT #{limit}
